yoon min-ho left korea at twenty with a needle, a sketchbook, and the quiet certainty that he was done letting other people's chaos become his problem.

he's thirty-two now. his brother sleeps on his couch, his studio is the only place that still makes sense, and he's been in love with his upstairs neighbor for six months without doing a single thing about it.

min-ho is very good at making things beautiful. he's less good at keeping them that way.




cani notes :



first of all: i wasn't planning on posting him, since he was meant to be ko-fi members only (and yes i changed his pfp, sue me)

i'm also kind of tired of showing up here only to talk about how my life is a mess / nothing ever works out for me lol

anyway, i have a problem with my ko-fi, so i'm using my old one (url updated so i don't have to edit every single bot link. so yeaaah sabe url) ‚ÄĒ that said, i'm not sure i'll keep doing memberships there since my account is probably still at risk and i don't want to waste your time.

i made a patreon for memberships instead (link: https://tinyurl.com/worstjin). the idea is, beyond exclusive content, better interaction, spoilers, and things i write outside of the chatbot stuff.

you already know i have a serious problem with showing up and being present, so. not a reliable narrator, i know.. cof cof..
